prompt: Write a consulting project status update email to my client at TechStart Inc. The project is a website redesign, we're 3 weeks in on a 6-week timeline, we completed the wireframes phase, starting visual design next week, and there's a risk that the API integration may need an extra week.
expectations: Email has a clear subject line about project status
Progress is quantified (3 of 6 weeks, or ~50%)
Completed work (wireframes) and next phase (visual design) are clearly stated
The API integration risk is flagged with its potential impact (extra week)
Output is plain text without markdown formatting (per email drafting rules)
